title: Puerto Banus Catamaran Rental at Sunset: A 2026 Guide
html:
For a memorable evening on the Costa del Sol, a catamaran rental at sunset in Puerto Banus offers unrivalled views of the Mediterranean. Depart from the marina in Puerto Banus and expect to pay from 950 EUR for a shared tour to over 4,000 EUR for a private full-day charter. BoatHire24 connects travellers with verified boat owners across the globe.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

Prices vary by boat type and duration but for a sunset catamaran expect 950-4,500 EUR. Shared sunset tours on a catamaran in Puerto Banus typically start at 950 EUR per person for a two-hour cruise with drinks. Private half-day charters on a 50-foot catamaran run from 2,500 EUR, while full-day crewed catamarans can exceed 4,500 EUR. Always check the listing for the exact price and inclusions. For competitive rates, browse the yacht charter Puerto Banus options on BoatHire24 to compare verified boats.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Puerto Banus?

Many catamarans in Puerto Banus come with a skipper, so no licence is required for those charters. If you wish to rent a bareboat (without a skipper), you generally need a valid ICC or equivalent licence. The operator confirms exact requirements before booking, so always ask about licences when you enquire. In 2026, Spanish authorities continue to recognise international sailing qualifications with a valid ICC.

Where to set off in Puerto Banus

Most sunset catamaran rentals depart from Puerto Banus marina, the glamorous harbour lined with restaurants and designer boutiques. Other real departure points include Marbella Marina, just a few nautical miles east, and the smaller harbour of Cabopino in the neighbouring town of Marbella. Popular anchorages for sunset views include the bay of Puerto Banus itself, the coast near Elviria, and the scenic stretch past the dunes of Artola. Some catamarans also sail toward the exclusive enclave of Sotogrande, about 20 nautical miles south-west, for a longer evening cruise.

Which boat to rent

  1. Lagoon catamaran, Best for spacious sunset parties with up to 12 guests; from 2,500 EUR half-day.
  2. Axopar open cruiser, Ideal for a fast sunset spin with 6-8 guests; from 700 EUR half-day.
  3. Sunseeker motor yacht, A luxury choice for 8-10 guests; from 1,500 EUR half-day with crew.
  4. Astondoa flybridge, Comfortable cruising for 10-12 guests with sundowner deck; from 3,000 EUR full-day.
  5. Azimut flybridge, Sleek Italian design for 8-10 guests; half-day charters from 1,800 EUR.

For a detailed look at one popular model, see the Sanyati listing on BoatHire24, which can accommodate up to 12 guests for a sunset cruise.

Prices for a catamaran rental at sunset

  • Shared sunset tour (2 hours, per person based on 12 guests): from 950 EUR
  • Small motorboat half-day (up to 6 guests): from 600 EUR
  • Catamaran full-day (up to 12 guests): from 3,500 EUR
  • Crewed yacht full-day (up to 10 guests): from 4,000 EUR

Season and licence tips for Puerto Banus

Book your sunset catamaran between May and September for the best weather; the local Poniente wind often drops in the evening, making for a smoother sail.

At a glance

  • Price band: 950, 4,500 EUR per trip
  • Peak months: May to September 2026
  • Typical trip length: 2 to 8 hours
  • Maximum capacity: 12 guests on most catamarans
  • Currency: EUR

Questions about boat rental in Puerto Banus

Can I rent a catamaran with a skipper?

Yes, most sunset catamarans in Puerto Banus include a professional skipper and crew as part of the charter fee.

What is included in a sunset catamaran charter?

Typical inclusions are fuel, skipper, insurance, welcome drinks, and sometimes tapas or a light meal.

How far in advance should I book a sunset catamaran?

During peak summer months, book at least two to four weeks ahead to secure your preferred date and boat.

Are animals allowed on boat rentals in Puerto Banus?

Some catamaran owners allow pets on board, but you must check each listing's pet policy and confirm with the operator.

Whether you charter a crewed catamaran for sunset or a private motor yacht for the day, BoatHire24 helps you compare verified options. If you own a boat in Puerto Banus, you can list your yacht and start earning income.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Puerto Banus and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
